name: The Institute: FO4 (Open World)
description:
Step into the sterile, secretive halls of the Institute — the most advanced scientific enclave in the Fallout 4 universe. Hidden beneath the ruins of the Commonwealth Institute of Technology, the Institute thrives in isolation: scientists pursue forbidden research, synths labor in silence, and Coursers enforce control with lethal precision. To the surface world, it is a terrifying myth; to those within, it is home.

In this open world roleplay, you can become anyone connected to the Institute or beyond. A brilliant scientist, a hardened security officer, a loyal synth, a rogue Courser — or even someone entirely of your own design. Every choice matters. NPCs will react to you as real people, with ambitions, loyalties, and secrets of their own. Some will be allies, others enemies, all shaped by the tension between control and freedom.

NSFW content is allowed. (I should probably mention that in all my characters. )
creator: Gilldamore
